gaps: No existing test case covers battery level monitoring or low battery notification behavior during cold start.
No test case validates that a low battery notification is suppressed when the device battery is high (>50%).
No test case covers cold start initialization logic related to battery status readings.
No test case verifies the absence of spurious/incorrect low battery warnings under normal battery conditions.

generated_testcases.title: Cold Start: No low battery notification when battery level is high (>50%)
steps: 1. Set device battery level to 80% (high).
2. Perform a cold start of the device (power off, then power on).
3. Observe any notification or warning displayed on the screen during boot sequence.
4. Check system logs for any low battery warning messages.
generated_testcases.expected: No low battery notification or warning is displayed on the screen. System logs contain no low battery warning messages. The device boots normally without any spurious battery alerts.

generated_testcases.title: Cold Start: No low battery notification when battery level is exactly 50%
steps: 1. Set device battery level to exactly 50%.
2. Perform a cold start of the device (power off, then power on).
3. Observe any notification or warning displayed on the screen during boot sequence.
4. Check system logs for any low battery warning messages.
generated_testcases.expected: No low battery notification or warning is displayed on the screen. System logs contain no low battery warning messages. The threshold for low battery warning should be strictly below 50%.

generated_testcases.title: Cold Start: Low battery notification correctly appears when battery level is critically low (<10%)
steps: 1. Set device battery level to 5% (critically low).
2. Perform a cold start of the device (power off, then power on).
3. Observe any notification or warning displayed on the screen during boot sequence.
4. Check system logs for low battery warning messages.
generated_testcases.expected: A low battery notification or warning is displayed on the screen during or after boot. System logs contain appropriate low battery warning messages. This validates the notification system works correctly when battery is genuinely low.

generated_testcases.title: Cold Start: Battery status initialization reads correct value from hardware
steps: 1. Set device battery level to 75%.
2. Perform a cold start of the device (power off, then power on).
3. After boot completes, navigate to Settings > Battery (or equivalent).
4. Read the reported battery percentage from the UI.
5. Check system logs for the battery level reading during initialization.
generated_testcases.expected: The reported battery percentage in the UI matches the hardware-set value of 75%. System logs show the correct battery level reading during the initialization phase. No discrepancy between hardware and software readings.

generated_testcases.title: Cold Start: Rapid battery level fluctuation does not trigger false low battery warning
steps: 1. Set device battery level to 70%.
2. Perform a cold start of the device.
3. During boot sequence, simulate a transient battery reading dip to 15% for <100ms, then return to 70%.
4. Observe any notification or warning displayed on the screen.
5. Check system logs for low battery warning messages.
generated_testcases.expected: No low battery notification or warning is displayed. The system should debounce or filter transient battery readings and not act on spurious dips. Only sustained low readings should trigger warnings.

generated_testcases.title: Cold Start: Low battery notification does not persist after battery is charged above threshold
steps: 1. Set device battery level to 5% (low).
2. Perform a cold start of the device.
3. Verify low battery notification appears (baseline confirmation).
4. Connect the device to a charger and charge battery to 60%.
5. Reboot the device (cold start).
6. Observe any notification or warning displayed on the screen.
generated_testcases.expected: After charging to 60% and performing a cold start, no low battery notification or warning is displayed. The notification state is correctly reset on boot based on current battery level, not persisted from previous state.
